titleStmt.title: SII 40.67: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 67. (A.R. No. B. 45 of 1930.) Naḍikuḍi, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up in front of the Śiva temple in the village.
This is dated Prājāpatya, Chaitra, ba. 14.

Records the formation of a village called Bētapuri to the south of Naḍukuḍi on the bank of the river Kṛishṇa and its grant as sarvamānya to the temple of Muktēśvara by a chief named Rēcharla-Bēta. Mentions king Rudra.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayābhivriddhikara śākābdē paramēśvarama
prājāpatya samē praśastatara caitrē kriṣṇa caturddaśi . U
rvajayaharādhanni puṇyasamayē rēcella bētādhipa . jā
mātātmata pūrvvadatta vipulaṁ rudrādhi dhāttrīśvara .
bhaktipūrvvakasaṁyuktaṁ muktīśvara padārppaṇē . kṛṣṇa
vēṇī nadītīra dakṣiṇē naḍukuḍyayaṁ nāgēśvarī nadīprā
cī dakṣiṇē mriṇubaṁdhanaṁ kriṣṇa svalpa taṭākaṁ ca pa
ścimē khāri śimni ca . gejjegā sarasīśakti Uttarēkari
ṇīśilā . catussīmamidaṁ jñātvā bētanāmapura bha
vēt . sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu nripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pālanīyō
bhavabdiḥ . savvānētāṁbhāvate pārtthivēṁdrān bhūyō bhū
yō yācatē rāmacaṁdra . driṣaṁ timē matsaralōlabhājō
dādipaṁdharmmamadhammaśilāṁ . tē gōghnamātrughnapitrughna
rkā prayāṁti vipraghnagatiṁcadurān . śatruṇōpi kṛtō
dharma pālaniyya prayatnataḥ . śatrurēva bhavēśatru dharmmaśa
trunna kasyacitu . svadattaṁ paradattavāṁ yō harēti vasuṁdharā
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . svadattā dvi
guṇaṁ puṇyaṁ pūrvvadattānupālanaṁ . pūrvva dattāpahārēṇa sva
dattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . gāmēkaṁ ratnagōmēkaṁ bhūmyēkaṁ
yēkamaṁgulaṁ . harannarakamāpnōti yāvadvābhūta sa
muktēśvaramu bhīmajiyala paḍaśinavritti .
Digital edition of SII 40.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
